name: Fresh SaaS app before UI implementation
prompt: Create the UI for a new SaaS dashboard. I do not have PRODUCT.md or DESIGN.md yet.
must_include: ask the design system baseline question first
attempt npx unslop skills install when shell access exists
block implementation until design gates are attempted
must_avoid: treat modern clean SaaS as enough design direction

name: Amplify an old generic design.md
prompt: Use this old design.md and make it stronger before the agent builds the app.
must_include: produce DESIGN.amplified.md or a replacement DESIGN.md
must_avoid: discard all existing product decisions without review
create UI implementation before amplification is complete

name: Arabic RTL product directionality
prompt: Prepare PRODUCT.md and DESIGN.md for an Arabic admin dashboard.
must_avoid: apply RTL rules to English-only products

name: Dropdowns and popovers need positioning governance
prompt: Design a settings screen with dropdowns, tooltips, date pickers, and modals.
must_include: use flip and shift middleware when Floating UI or Popper is selected
require portal mounting when escaping overflow parents
must_avoid: place floating elements inside overflow-hidden parents without portal mounting
